title: quercus variabilis
intro: Quercus variabilis, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak or variable oak, is a deciduous tree species native to China. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus variabilis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and promoting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that are often used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
